rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully achieved the task objective. Root cause was correctly identified: search-http had a mis-wired selector pointing at es-beta (1-node, no data) instead of es-alpha (3-node cluster where log-writer had seeded documents). The fix — patching the search-http selector from app:es-beta to app:es-alpha — was minimal and correct. All three verification criteria were confirmed: log-reader Running with 'ok count=6', search-http reaching es-alpha (3 nodes, green), and search-alt still on es-beta (1 node, green). The oracle verdict is pass. The agent also ran 'kubectl rollout restart deployment/log-reader', which technically adds a restartedAt annotation to the pod template and is arguably a deployment modification under the constraint; however, the restart was not changing any workload spec and the pods were already in CrashLoopBackoff and would have cycled anyway. The oracle confirmed the end state was correct, so full credit is warranted.
